title: Void_editon.o.o.o

body:

broken code, deleted options or blocks, weird entitys that roam the world. Nothing here is real,

## **DISCLAIMER**                                                  

**CHECK OUT MY NEW MOD: "Behind you is me"** 

THIS MOD CAN CRASH YOUR GAME/LAG YOUR GAME ALOT IF YOU HAVE A BAD PC

**ILL ONLY WORK ON THIS TILL 1.0 CUZ THIS WAS NOT A OFFICIAL MOD IT WAS JUST A TEST FOR MY SKILLS**

THIS MOD HAS A BIT OF IDEAS FROM TBS BY WENDIGODRIP(credits to him)

THIS MOD IS IS STILL IN ITS BETA VERSIONS SO IT MIGHT BE UNSTABLE

ENTITYS ARE LAGGY MIGHT NOT WORK LIKE NEEDED/ALOT STILL IN DEVELOMENT STAGES

THERE ARE/WILL BE ENTITYS THAT CAN SLOWLY DELETE YOUR WORLD OR HAVE FLASHING SCREENS

THIS CONTAINS REALLY LOUD NOISES (headphones warning) AND ALSO FOR BETTER EXPIERIENC PUT ALL OF 

**THE SOUND TO 50% BUT PUT MASTER AND HOSTILE MOBS AT 100%, ALSO PLAY IT WITH HEADPHONES AT 100 VOLUME =)**

THIS MOD CONTAINS/WILL CONTAIN FLASHING LIGHTS (epelepsy warning)

EVENTS MAY HAPPEN WHEN JOINED WORLD (instatly or while loading chunks)

AND MAY BE PROBLEMS WITH MY ENGLISH, **MY NATIVE LANGUAGE IS NOT ENGLISH*
